diffs.diff:
--- a/debug_predict.py
+++ b/debug_predict.py
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+import os, json

+import numpy as np

+import pandas as pd

+import qlib

+from qlib.contrib.data.handler import Alpha158

+from qlib.data import D

+

+qlib.init(provider_uri='/data/qlib_data', region='cn')

+

+handler = Alpha158(

+    start_time='2008-01-01',

+    end_time='2023-12-31',

+    fit_start_time='2008-01-01',

+    fit_end_time='2020-12-31',

+    instruments='csi300',

+)

+df = handler.fetch(selector=slice('2022-01-01','2023-12-31'), data_key='infer', col_set='feature')

+print('test feat shape:', df.shape, flush=True)

+print('index names:', df.index.names, flush=True)

+print('head index:', df.index[:3].tolist(), flush=True)

+print('tail index:', df.index[-3:].tolist(), flush=True)

+

+instr = D.instruments('csi300')

+df_label = D.features(instr, ['Ref($close, -1) / $close - 1'], start_time='2022-01-01', end_time='2023-12-31')

+print('label shape:', df_label.shape, flush=True)

+print('label index names:', df_label.index.names, flush=True)

+print('label head:', df_label.index[:3].tolist(), flush=True)

+

+# Try concat

+df.columns = list(df.columns)

+print('feat cols sample:', list(df.columns)[:5], flush=True)
